archive_builder_hooks.charged_residual_contract: Use estimated_byte_cost_model as a proxy only; a builder must emit deterministic charged bytes and record exact payload hashes.
archive_builder_hooks.required_next_validation: archive.zip -> inflate.sh -> upstream/evaluate.py via experiments/contest_auth_eval.py --device cuda

differentiable_feedback_contract.gradient_truth_boundary: Differentiable rewards are proposal signals only; exact CUDA auth eval of a deterministic byte-closed archive is the score truth.

smooth_surrogate_targets.atom_density: maximize expected component benefit per charged byte
smooth_surrogate_targets.selection_probability: relax hard policy choice with softmax/Gumbel over rank_cost_proxy
smooth_surrogate_targets.trust_region: penalize source-change mass outside measured hotspot/confusion priors

dispatch_relevance.reason: changes source under empirical byte proxy; still requires deterministic archive builder
